syntax_13217.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13217.title: Redis Strings - get redis string
syntax_13217.description: Returns the string stored in Redis.

en: Returns the string stored in Redis.

syntax_13198.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13198.title: Redis Message Event - message is from proxy
syntax_13198.description:
Checks if the message is from the proxy.
This will only return true if the message is from RediVelocity if you have the integration enabled.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

en:
Checks if the message is from the proxy.
This will only return true if the message is from RediVelocity if you have the integration enabled.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

syntax_13199.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13199.title: Redis Hashes - delete redis hash
syntax_13199.description: Deletes the given hash from Redis.

en: Deletes the given hash from Redis.

syntax_13202.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13202.title: Redis Lists - add value to redis list
syntax_13202.description: Adds a value to a specific list stored in Redis

en: Adds a value to a specific list stored in Redis

syntax_13203.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13203.title: Redis Lists - delete entry with index from redis list
syntax_13203.description: Deletes the entry with the given index from the list stored in Redis.
syntax_13203.syntax_pattern: delete entry with index %number% from redis (list|array) %string%

en: Deletes the entry with the given index from the list stored in Redis.

syntax_13204.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13204.title: Redis Lists - delete entry with value from redis list
syntax_13204.description: Deletes the entry with the given value from the list stored in Redis.
syntax_13204.syntax_pattern: delete entry with value %string% from redis (list|array) %string%

en: Deletes the entry with the given value from the list stored in Redis.

syntax_13205.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13205.title: Redis Lists - delete redis list
syntax_13205.description: Deletes the given list from Redis.

en: Deletes the given list from Redis.

syntax_13206.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13206.title: Redis Lists - set redis list value
syntax_13206.description:
Sets a specific index in a Redis list to a new value.
It will overwrite the value at the given index.
NOTE: If the index does not already exist, it will fail.
syntax_13206.syntax_pattern: set entry with index %number% in redis (list|array) %string% to %string%

en:
Sets a specific index in a Redis list to a new value.
It will overwrite the value at the given index.
NOTE: If the index does not already exist, it will fail.

syntax_13207.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13207.title: Redis Pub/Sub - send redis message
syntax_13207.description: Sends a message to a specific channel in Redis.

en: Sends a message to a specific channel in Redis.

syntax_13208.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13208.title: Redis Strings - delete redis string
syntax_13208.description: Deletes the given string from Redis.
syntax_13208.syntax_pattern:
delete redis string %string%
set redis string %string% to %string%

en: Deletes the given string from Redis.

syntax_13209.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13209.title: Redis Hashes - get all field names of redis hash
syntax_13209.description: Returns all field names of a hash stored in Redis.
syntax_13209.syntax_pattern: all field names of redis hash %string%

en: Returns all field names of a hash stored in Redis.

syntax_13210.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13210.title: Redis Hashes - get all field values of redis hash
syntax_13210.description: Returns all field values of a hash stored in Redis.
syntax_13210.syntax_pattern: all field values of redis hash %string%

en: Returns all field values of a hash stored in Redis.

syntax_13211.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13211.title: Redis Hashes - get field names by value
syntax_13211.description: Returns all field names of a hash stored in Redis that have the given value.
syntax_13211.syntax_pattern: name[s] of field with value %string% in redis (hash|value) %string%

en: Returns all field names of a hash stored in Redis that have the given value.

syntax_13212.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13212.title: Redis Hashes - get value of field in redis hash
syntax_13212.description: Returns the value of a field stored in a hash that is stored Redis.

en: Returns the value of a field stored in a hash that is stored Redis.

syntax_13213.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13213.title: Redis Lists - get redis list
syntax_13213.description: Returns all values of a list stored in Redis.

en: Returns all values of a list stored in Redis.

syntax_13214.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13214.title: Redis Message Event - get redis channel
syntax_13214.description:
Returns the channel name of the Redis message event.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

en:
Returns the channel name of the Redis message event.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

syntax_13215.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13215.title: Redis Message Event - get redis message
syntax_13215.description:
Returns the message of the Redis message event.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

en:
Returns the message of the Redis message event.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

syntax_13216.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13216.title: Redis Message event - message date
syntax_13216.description:
Returns the date of the Redis message event as unix timestamp.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

en:
Returns the date of the Redis message event as unix timestamp.
This can only be used in the Redis Message Event.

syntax_13200.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13200.title: Redis Hashes - delete redis hash field
syntax_13200.description: Deletes the given hash field from a hash stored in Redis.

en: Deletes the given hash field from a hash stored in Redis.

syntax_13741.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13741.title: Async Operations - stop async run
syntax_13741.description: Stops an async run that was started with `run async`.

en: Stops an async run that was started with `run async`.

syntax_13742.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13742.title: Async Operations - run async
syntax_13742.description: Runs the following code asynchronously on another thread. Useful for long-running operations.

en: Runs the following code asynchronously on another thread. Useful for long-running operations.

syntax_13940.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13940.title: On custom redis message
syntax_13940.description: Called when any message is received from Redis. The message is a JSON string that can be parsed by SkJson for example.

en: Called when any message is received from Redis. The message is a JSON string that can be parsed by SkJson for example.

syntax_13197.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13197.title: On redis message
syntax_13197.description: Called when a message is received from Redis. This event only fires when the message is sent by SkRedis.

en: Called when a message is received from Redis. This event only fires when the message is sent by SkRedis.

syntax_13941.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13941.title: Redis Keys - exists
syntax_13941.description: Checks if a given key of any type exists in Redis.

en: Checks if a given key of any type exists in Redis.

syntax_13201.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13201.title: Redis Hashes - set redis hash field
syntax_13201.description: Sets the given hash field to a value in a hash stored in Redis.

en: Sets the given hash field to a value in a hash stored in Redis.

syntax_13942.creator: bypixeltv
syntax_13942.title: Redis Pub/Sub - send custom redis message
syntax_13942.description: Sends a custom message to a specific channel in Redis. The message has to be a valid JSON string. If not, the message will not be sent and a warning will be printed in the console.

en: Sends a custom message to a specific channel in Redis. The message has to be a valid JSON string. If not, the message will not be sent and a warning will be printed in the console.
